title: Recognised Seasonal Employer (RSE) forms and guides :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Recognised Seasonal Employer forms and guides
Forms and guides for horticulture and viticulture employers in the Recognised Seasonal Employer (RSE) Scheme.
Do not save copies of these forms. Download them from this page each time you need one. You then get the current version.
